mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_project WHERE user_ids IN ( ${userId})

SELECT t1.project_name, t1.project_id, t1.create_time, t1.create_by, t1.update_by, t1.user_ids, t1.project_head_id, t1.update_time FROM sys_project t1 left join sys_worker_user t2 on t2.id = t1.project_head_id WHERE t1.project_id = #{projectId} order by t1.create_time desc
SELECT * FROM sys_worker_user WHERE id IN ( #{userIds})
